message:
fix(clippy): replace r#"..."# with r"..." in crypto randomBytes test

The raw string in the randomBytes UUID-pattern test block contained no
special characters requiring the hash-delimited r#"..."# form. Clippy's
needless_raw_string_hashes lint flags this; switch to plain r"..." to
silence the warning with zero semantic change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
